tell_me_about_yourself.question: Tell me about yourself.
tell_me_about_yourself.answer: I am a Full Stack Developer with 1+ year of hands-on experience, currently working as a Junior React Developer at AdsHi5. I specialize in building scalable, responsive, and accessible web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js. I have worked on real-time features using WebSockets and recently contributed to a healthcare application with voice-driven workflows and dynamic clinical charts. I also have freelance experience where I handled end-to-end development, including frontend, backend APIs, and databases.

why_looking_for_job_change.question: Why are you looking for a job now?
why_looking_for_job_change.answer: My current role has been a great learning experience, but the growth and technical exposure have become limited. I’m now looking for an opportunity that offers more complex challenges, deeper ownership, and a stronger learning curve where I can continue to grow as a full stack developer.

current_role_and_responsibilities.question: What is your current role and responsibilities?
current_role_and_responsibilities.answer: I currently work as a Junior React Developer at AdsHi5. My responsibilities include building responsive and reusable UI components using React and Tailwind CSS, integrating REST APIs, collaborating closely with backend teams, and implementing real-time features using WebSockets. I also focus on accessibility, performance optimization, and maintaining clean frontend architecture.

technologies_you_work_with.question: What technologies do you work with?
technologies_you_work_with.answer: On the frontend, I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, and Vite. On the backend, I have experience with Node.js, Django, REST APIs, and WebSockets. I’ve worked with MongoDB, MySQL, and PostgreSQL for databases, and I use Git and GitHub for version control.

projects_worked_on.question: What projects have you worked on?
projects_worked_on.answer: One of my key projects was a healthcare application called CareScribe. I worked on building real-time clinical dashboards, including a Periodontal Chart that updates live using WebSockets. The system integrates LLMs to convert doctor voice input into structured JSON data, which is then reflected dynamically on the UI. I also worked on freelance projects where I developed complete web solutions from frontend to backend.

challenging_problem_solved.question: What is a challenging technical problem you solved?
challenging_problem_solved.answer: While working on the real-time Periodontal Chart, we faced latency issues where LLM responses were taking more than 8 seconds. I debugged the data flow, optimized the prompt structure, and improved frontend-backend communication, which reduced the response time to around 2–3 seconds and significantly improved the user experience.

frontend_strengths.question: What are your strengths as a frontend developer?
frontend_strengths.answer: My strengths include strong React fundamentals, component-driven architecture, performance optimization, accessibility-focused design, and building clean, maintainable UIs. I pay close attention to user experience and collaborate effectively with designers and backend developers.

backend_experience.question: Do you have backend experience?
backend_experience.answer: Yes, I have hands-on backend experience using Node.js and Django. I’ve built RESTful APIs, integrated databases like MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and handled authentication, data modeling, and API integration for both freelance and professional projects.

current_and_expected_ctc.question: What is your current CTC and expected CTC?
current_and_expected_ctc.answer: My current CTC is ___ LPA. Based on my skills, experience, and market standards, I’m expecting around ___ LPA. However, I’m flexible and open to discussion for the right opportunity and role.

why_should_we_hire_you.question: Why should we hire you?
why_should_we_hire_you.answer: I bring hands-on experience building real-world applications, strong frontend fundamentals, and practical exposure to backend systems. I’m comfortable working on real-time features, focus on clean and scalable code, and collaborate well with cross-functional teams. I’m a quick learner and motivated to take ownership and grow with the team.

career_goals.question: Where do you see yourself in the next 2–3 years?
career_goals.answer: In the next few years, I aim to grow into a strong full stack engineer who can design scalable systems, mentor junior developers, and contribute to high-impact products while continuously improving my technical depth.
